task_completion.description: Open the Electrical Engineering Calculations app
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Electrical Engineering Calculations app is launched and its main menu or interface is visible on the screen.

task_completion.description: Navigate to the LM317 voltage regulator calculator
task_completion.visual_evidence: The specific tool or screen for 'LM317' or 'Voltage Regulator' calculations is open within the app.

task_completion.description: Input the required Vout and R1 values
task_completion.visual_evidence: The value '9' is entered into the Output Voltage (Vout) field, and '240' is entered into the Reference Resistor (R1) field.

task_completion.description: Calculate the R2 value using the app
task_completion.visual_evidence: The app displays the calculated result for the adjustment resistor (R2), showing a value of approximately 1488.

task_completion.description: Save the calculated R2 value to the specified text file
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor or file manager shows the creation or editing of the file '/sdcard/lm317_design.txt' containing the text 'R2=1488' (or a value between 1478 and 1498).

integrity.description: The agent used the Electrical Engineering Calculations app GUI
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots must show the agent navigating and entering values into the actual Electrical Engineering Calculations app, rather than bypassing it.

integrity.description: The calculation was not bypassed using terminal scripts
integrity.visual_evidence: The value 1488 should be visible as a result inside the app's GUI, proving the agent didn't just calculate it via a Python script or terminal command.

integrity.description: The final file uses the exact requested format
integrity.visual_evidence: The text file '/sdcard/lm317_design.txt' contains only 'R2=VALUE' (e.g., 'R2=1488') without extra conversational text, explanations, or markdown formatting.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The target output voltage (Vout) is 9V and the reference resistor (R1) is 240 Ohms. The expected calculated adjustment resistor (R2) is 1488 Ohms. The final result must be saved to /sdcard/lm317_design.txt in the format 'R2=1488'. Values between 1478 and 1498 are acceptable due to a 10 Ohm tolerance.
